svg.text: Gamble Battle - Phase 1 Trait Visual Calibration
Vector grammar index for palette, form, surface, motion, cost and do-don't channels.
Authoritative review raster: trait_visual_bible_phase1.png
Aegis
form=nested | surface=closure | motion=inward | cost=calcify | pass=protected void inside closing mass | fail=clean shield badge
Arcanist
form=taper | surface=syntax | motion=rewrite | cost=erase | pass=one precise locus of illegal notation | fail=purple wizard stars
Blessed
form=burden | surface=gilded_cracks | motion=transfer | cost=stigmata | pass=disgrace and weight before radiance | fail=clean halo hero
Bulwark
form=compress | surface=pressure | motion=rebound | cost=rupture | pass=stored force in compressed mass | fail=ordinary castle plate
Cartel
form=hierarchy | surface=ledger | motion=cascade | cost=stamp | pass=rank and ownership made structural | fail=coin-covered merchant
Catalyst
form=splice | surface=seam | motion=fuse | cost=weld | pass=two incompatible systems forced together | fail=sparkle alchemist
Chronomancer
form=stagger | surface=ticks | motion=desync | cost=age | pass=offset cadence visible in repeated intervals | fail=clock-face costume
Executioner
form=shear | surface=cutline | motion=sever | cost=split | pass=single decisive threshold and follow-through | fail=skull-and-axe emblem
Exile
form=broken_orbit | surface=weathered_edge | motion=repel | cost=missing | pass=asymmetric absence that resists reunion | fail=hooded wanderer
Fortified
form=strata | surface=settlement | motion=settle | cost=compact | pass=load-bearing density and low movement | fail=generic stone wall
Harmony
form=counterpoint | surface=moire | motion=oscillate | cost=cancel | pass=two unequal rhythms briefly align | fail=heart-shaped friendship
Kaleidoscope
form=fracture | surface=chromatic_fault | motion=refract | cost=sensory | pass=weathered perception fracture with dark rest | fail=glossy rainbow crystal
Liaison
form=triangulate | surface=tension_lines | motion=relay | cost=tether | pass=relationship shown by stressed intervals | fail=decorative chain links
Mentor
form=unequal_pair | surface=transfer_bands | motion=teach | cost=drain | pass=visible unequal transfer and dependence | fail=kindly teacher robe
Mogul
form=accrue | surface=tallies | motion=compound | cost=hollow | pass=survival accumulates into top-heavy mass | fail=gold coin king
Overload
form=coil | surface=burnout | motion=burst | cost=conduit | pass=pressure outruns its failing container | fail=electric orb aura
Sanguine
form=circulate | surface=capillary | motion=return | cost=thrombose | pass=circulation, appetite and repair share one path | fail=single vampire stereotype
Scholar
form=archive | surface=palimpsest | motion=layer | cost=bury | pass=knowledge stored in ordered bodily layers | fail=book-and-mortarboard
Striker
form=thrust | surface=impact | motion=advance | cost=recoil | pass=forward commitment with little retreat mass | fail=generic sword fighter
Titan
form=monument | surface=growth_rings | motion=expand | cost=hollow_growth | pass=scale with internal biological consequence | fail=healthy heroic giant
Trader
form=exchange | surface=wear_marks | motion=swap | cost=deplete | pass=reciprocal flow with visible loss each cycle | fail=market-arrow logo
Vindicator
form=converge | surface=erosion | motion=hunt | cost=self_erase | pass=all pressure narrows toward one condemned point | fail=angry revenge eye
